headline: Why Is Invitation Home (INVH) Down 2.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Invitation Home (INVH) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Invitation Homes (INVH) Dividend Amid FTC Settlement And Tighter Compliance
summary: Earlier this month, Invitation Homes Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.30 per share on its common stock, payable on or before April 17, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 26, 2026. A separate Federal Trade Commission action saw Invitation Homes agree to pay US$48.00 million to renters for undisclosed fees and adopt stricter leasing and security deposit practices, sharpening focus on regulatory and reputational pressures in the single-family rental sector. We’ll now...
